        updateFleetMovementHistory
      • updateFleetMovementHistory(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; fleetId: FleetId; owner: HouseId; systemId: SystemId; turn: int)
Source   Edit  

Intelligence Report Types

Defines intelligence data structures for spy scout missions Per intel.md and operations.md specifications

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/tech

Types

ColonyIntelReport = object
  colonyId*: SystemId
  targetOwner*: HouseId
  gatheredTurn*: int
  quality*: IntelQuality
  population*: int
  industry*: int
  defenses*: int
  starbaseLevel*: int
  constructionQueue*: seq[string]
  grossOutput*: Option[int]
  taxRevenue*: Option[int]
  unassignedSquadronCount*: int
  reserveFleetCount*: int
  mothballedFleetCount*: int
  shipyardCount*: int
Intelligence on an enemy colony (SpyOnPlanet mission) Per intel.md:107-121 Source   Edit   
CombatEncounterReport = object
  reportId*: string
  turn*: int
  systemId*: SystemId
  phase*: CombatPhase
  reportingHouse*: HouseId
  alliedForces*: seq[CombatFleetComposition]
  enemyForces*: seq[CombatFleetComposition]
  outcome*: CombatOutcome
  alliedLosses*: seq[string]
  enemyLosses*: seq[string]
  retreatedAllies*: seq[FleetId]
  retreatedEnemies*: seq[FleetId]
  survived*: bool
Intelligence report from combat encounter Generated automatically when fleets engage in combat Surviving ships report detailed composition and outcome Source   Edit   
CombatFleetComposition = object
  fleetId*: FleetId
  owner*: HouseId
  standingOrders*: Option[FleetOrderIntel]
  squadrons*: seq[SquadronIntel]
  spaceLiftShips*: seq[SpaceLiftCargoIntel]
  isCloaked*: bool
Detailed fleet composition observed in combat Source   Edit   
CombatOutcome {.pure.} = enum
  Victory, Defeat, Retreat, MutualRetreat, Ongoing
Outcome of combat from reporter's perspective Source   Edit   
CombatPhase {.pure.} = enum
  Space, Orbital, Planetary
Phase of combat where encounter occurred Source   Edit   
ConstructionActivityReport = object
  systemId*: SystemId
  owner*: HouseId
  observedTurns*: seq[int]
  infrastructureHistory*: seq[tuple[turn: int, level: int]]
  shipyardCount*: int
  spaceportCount*: int
  starbaseCount*: int
  activeProjects*: seq[string]
  completedSinceLastVisit*: seq[string]
Track construction progress at enemy colonies over time Source   Edit   
EspionageActivityReport = object
  turn*: int
  perpetrator*: HouseId
  action*: string
  targetSystem*: Option[SystemId]
  detected*: bool
  description*: string
Record of detected espionage activity against this house Generated when espionage attempts are detected Source   Edit   
FleetIntel = object
  fleetId*: FleetId
  owner*: HouseId
  location*: SystemId
  shipCount*: int
  standingOrders*: Option[string]
  spaceLiftShipCount*: Option[int]
  squadronDetails*: Option[seq[SquadronIntel]]
Intel on a specific fleet Source   Edit   
FleetMovementHistory = object
  fleetId*: FleetId
  owner*: HouseId
  sightings*: seq[tuple[turn: int, systemId: SystemId]]
  patrolRoute*: Option[seq[SystemId]]
  lastKnownLocation*: SystemId
  lastSeen*: int
Historical tracking of fleet movements Built up from multiple scout sightings Source   Edit   
FleetOrderIntel = object
  orderType*: string
  targetSystem*: Option[SystemId]
Intelligence on enemy fleet's standing orders Source   Edit   
IntelligenceDatabase = object
  colonyReports*: Table[SystemId, ColonyIntelReport]
  systemReports*: Table[SystemId, SystemIntelReport]
  starbaseReports*: Table[SystemId, StarbaseIntelReport]
  espionageActivity*: seq[EspionageActivityReport]
  combatReports*: seq[CombatEncounterReport]
  scoutEncounters*: seq[ScoutEncounterReport]
  fleetMovementHistory*: Table[FleetId, FleetMovementHistory]
  constructionActivity*: Table[SystemId, ConstructionActivityReport]
  starbaseSurveillance*: seq[StarbaseSurveillanceReport]
Collection of all intelligence reports for a house Stored per-house in GameState Source   Edit   
IntelQuality {.pure.} = enum
  Visual, Scan, Spy, Perfect
Quality/source of intelligence Source   Edit   
ScoutEncounterReport = object
  reportId*: string
  scoutId*: string
  turn*: int
  systemId*: SystemId
  encounterType*: ScoutEncounterType
  observedHouses*: seq[HouseId]
  fleetDetails*: seq[FleetIntel]
  colonyDetails*: Option[ColonyIntelReport]
  fleetMovements*: seq[tuple[fleetId: FleetId, fromSystem: Option[SystemId],
                             toSystem: Option[SystemId]]]
  description*: string
  significance*: int
Detailed report from scout reconnaissance Scouts generate these for EVERYTHING they observe Source   Edit   
ScoutEncounterType {.pure.} = enum
  FleetSighting, ColonyDiscovered, Bombardment, Blockade, Combat, Construction,
  FleetMovement, DiplomaticActivity
Type of encounter a scout observed Source   Edit   
SensorQuality {.pure.} = enum
  None, Visual, Scan, Perfect
Quality of sensor detection Source   Edit   
SpaceLiftCargoIntel = object
  shipClass*: string
  cargoType*: string
  quantity*: int
  isCrippled*: bool
Intelligence on spacelift ship cargo (troop transports, ETACs) Source   Edit   
SquadronIntel = object
  squadronId*: string
  shipClass*: string
  shipCount*: int
  techLevel*: int
  hullIntegrity*: Option[int]
Detailed squadron information Source   Edit   
StarbaseIntelReport = object
  systemId*: SystemId
  targetOwner*: HouseId
  gatheredTurn*: int
  quality*: IntelQuality
  treasuryBalance*: Option[int]
  grossIncome*: Option[int]
  netIncome*: Option[int]
  taxRate*: Option[float]
  researchAllocations*: Option[tuple[erp: int, srp: int, trp: int]]
  currentResearch*: Option[string]
  techLevels*: Option[TechLevel]
Intelligence from hacking a starbase (HackStarbase mission) Per intel.md and operations.md:6.2.11 - "economic and R&D intelligence" Source   Edit   
StarbaseSurveillanceReport = object
  starbaseId*: string
  systemId*: SystemId
  owner*: HouseId
  turn*: int
  detectedFleets*: seq[tuple[fleetId: FleetId, location: SystemId,
                             owner: HouseId, shipCount: int]]
  undetectedFleets*: seq[FleetId]
  transitingFleets*: seq[tuple[fleetId: FleetId, fromSystem: SystemId,
                               toSystem: SystemId]]
  combatDetected*: seq[SystemId]
  bombardmentDetected*: seq[SystemId]
  significantActivity*: bool
  threatsDetected*: int
Continuous surveillance from starbase advanced sensors Starbases monitor their sector (system + adjacent systems) automatically Only scouts and cloaked raiders can evade detection (stealth roll required) Source   Edit   
SystemIntelReport = object
  systemId*: SystemId
  gatheredTurn*: int
  quality*: IntelQuality
  detectedFleets*: seq[FleetIntel]
Intelligence on enemy fleets in a system (SpyOnSystem mission) Per intel.md:96-105 Source   Edit  

Procs

proc addColonyReport(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; report: ColonyIntelReport) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add or update colony intelligence report Source   Edit   
proc addCombatReport(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; report: CombatEncounterReport) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add combat encounter report to chronological log Source   Edit   
proc addEspionageActivity(db: var IntelligenceDatabase;
                          report: EspionageActivityReport) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add espionage activity report to log Source   Edit   
proc addScoutEncounter(db: var IntelligenceDatabase;
                       report: ScoutEncounterReport) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Add scout encounter report to intelligence log Source   Edit   
proc addStarbaseReport(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; report: StarbaseIntelReport) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add or update starbase intelligence report Source   Edit   
proc addStarbaseSurveillance(db: var IntelligenceDatabase;
                             report: StarbaseSurveillanceReport) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add starbase surveillance report Source   Edit   
proc addSystemReport(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; report: SystemIntelReport) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add or update system intelligence report Source   Edit   
proc getColonyIntel(db: IntelligenceDatabase; systemId: SystemId): Option[
    ColonyIntelReport] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieve colony intel if available Source   Edit   
proc getIntelStaleness(report: ColonyIntelReport | SystemIntelReport |
    StarbaseIntelReport; currentTurn: int): int
Calculate how many turns old this intel is Source   Edit   
proc getStarbaseIntel(db: IntelligenceDatabase; systemId: SystemId): Option[
    StarbaseIntelReport] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieve starbase intel if available Source   Edit   
proc getSystemIntel(db: IntelligenceDatabase; systemId: SystemId): Option[
    SystemIntelReport] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieve system intel if available Source   Edit   
proc newIntelligenceDatabase(): IntelligenceDatabase {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create empty intelligence database Source   Edit   
proc updateConstructionActivity(db: var IntelligenceDatabase;
                                systemId: SystemId; owner: HouseId; turn: int;
                                infrastructure: int; shipyards: int;
                                spaceports: int; starbases: int;
                                activeProjects: seq[string]) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Update construction activity tracking for a colony Source   Edit   
proc updateFleetMovementHistory(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; fleetId: FleetId;
                                owner: HouseId; systemId: SystemId; turn: int) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Update fleet movement tracking with new sighting Source   Edit  

Made with Nim. Generated: 1980-01-01 00:00:00 UTC
